posts.author: alan.every (Alan Every)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have looked through documentation and available triggers / integrations etc.

I would like to fire an event when a user archives, or unarchives a board. This is for third party integration work. I cannot see any triggers related to boards. Anyone know of a way to achieve this?
